title: Craftable Mushrooms
description: Simple Mod/Datack That Adds Recipes For Mushrooms and Mushroom blocks.
body:
## 🍄About Simple Mushroom Crafting is a lightweight Quality of Life (QoL) mod/datapack that makes mushroom building blocks fully craftable and reversible. Whether you need compact storage for your mushroom farms or easy access to mushroom blocks for building, this pack has you covered. ## 📋 Recipes 🟥-> Red Mushroom Block, 🟫-> Brown Mushroom Block | Result | Ingredients | Recipe Pattern | |---|---|---| | Red Mushroom Block | 4x Red Mushroom | 🍄🍄
🍄🍄 | | Brown Mushroom Block | 4x Brown Mushroom | 🍄‍🟫🍄‍🟫
🍄‍🟫🍄‍🟫 | | 4x Red Mushroom | Red Mushroom Block | 🟥 | | 4x Brown Mushroom | Brown Mushroom Block | 🟫 | | 1x Mushroom Stem | 2x Red Mushroom
2x Brown Mushroom | 🍄‍🟫🍄
🍄🍄‍🟫 | | 4x Mushroom Stem | 2x Red Mushroom Block
2x Brown Mushroom Block | 🟥🟫
🟫🟥 | Tip: Use [Just Enough Items(JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To View The Recipe In-Game ## 🧩 Installation Guide **How to Install the Mod (.jar)** 1. Download the Mod: Get the .jar file for Create: Veridium Recipe. 2. Drop the File: Drag the downloaded .jar. **How to Install the Datapack (.zip)** 1. Download: Get the .zip file for the Datapack version. 2. Open Your World Folder: 3. Install: Open the datapacks folder and drag the downloaded .zip file inside. ## ⚙️ Supported Version |Version|Loader|Support| |---|---|---| |1.21.1+|Forge/Neoforge/Fabric/Quilt|soon| |1.21.1 -> 1.13|Forge/Neoforge/Fabric/Quilt|✅| ## 📦 Other Recipes # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server?
